message:
Improve phrasing in count_field documentation

Change "After timeout expiration" to "After a timeout expires" for
more natural readability.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -200,7 +200,7 @@ key:
   dropped
 - **After suppression**: Shows how many events were dropped before this one was
   allowed through
-- **After timeout expiration**: Resets to `0` since the deduplication state was
+- **After a timeout expires**: Resets to `0` since the deduplication state was
   cleared
 
 This makes it easy to identify which events represent the start of a new
